claims.name: physical_ratio_in_box
claims.detail: (the physical {200} response (A1, A2*(A1)) lies inside the continuum-certified box |A1|,|A2|<=0.16 for every probed A1: the physical operating point is covered by the no-condensate continuum result)

claims.name: no_condensate_at_physical_ratio
claims.detail: (dF_anchored at the physical {200}/{110} ratio (the per-row minimum over A2,M) is > 0 for every A1: Reading-H wins even at the most-favourable secondary-shell response)

claims.name: ratio_modest_negative_branch
claims.detail: (the physical {200} response is on the NEGATIVE branch (sextic-driven, per Math434) with |A2*|_max=0.0800 < 0.16 and |rho|_max=0.571: the {200} shell is suppressed relative to {110}, well interior to the box)

claims.name: sanity_matches_math434_A1_0p14
claims.detail: (A1=0.14 physical A2*=-0.0800 is on the negative branch near Math434's audited per-row optimum A2 ~ -0.065 +/- 0.015)

claims.name: sanity_continuum_consistency
claims.detail: (every per-row min exceeds the diagonal whole-box min 3.9e-5: consistent with the exact-Wick continuum no-condensate of twoshell-anchored-continuum v1.0)
